arts.ttl: 'Spurs' lost tourists ransacked by revived Rangers'
arts.sum: Tottenham weren't ready for what Rangers threw at them but got out of jail with their Europa League equaliser, writes Tom English.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford absent from Man Utd travelling squad as Alejandro Garnacho decision made
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has revealed that he's 'ready' to leave boyhood club Manchester United, who face Tottenham for a place in the Carabao Cup semi-finals on Thursday

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's squad update from Inside Spurs
arts.sum: Yves Bissouma returns from suspension, while Ange gave us the latest on Mikey Moore, Ben Davies, Richarlison, Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven. Particularly relevant for this huge game, Ange reiterated that Destiny Udogie may still have a chance to feature after departing early from Sunday's 5-0 win at Southampton after feeling tightness in his quad.

arts.ttl: Man United squad for Tottenham 'confirmed' as Marcus Rashford, Alejandro Garnacho 'learn fate'
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho allegedly earns a recall to the Manchester United squad for Thursday's EFL Cup quarter-final against Tottenham Hotspur, but Marcus Rashford has seemingly been left out.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes huge Alejandro Garnacho decision which hints at future plans
arts.sum: It has been a crazy week in the life of Alejandro Garnacho following the youngster being dropped for the Manchester Derby last Sunday. The 20-year-old, alongside Marcus Rashford, were left out of Ruben Amorim’s squad to face Man City with the Portuguese coach explaining that the pair had not met training standards, amid other things. […] The post Ruben Amorim makes huge Alejandro Garnacho decision which hints at future plans appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou hints Spurs player backed to become 'one of the world’s best' may now not start tomorrow
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are in Carabao Cup quarter-final action on Thursday night as they host Manchester United in North London. Spurs will be eager to take...

arts.ttl: Tottenham legend delivers Ange Postecoglou sack verdict as Daniel Levy sent firm message
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou must be given more time to work on his Tottenham Hotspur project, and chairman Daniel Levy cannot keep changing managers, Kasey Keller tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola's 'stance' on Man United's Marcus Rashford 'revealed' amid transfer talk
arts.sum: Manchester City head coach Pep Guardiola is reportedly 'a big fan' of Manchester United's Marcus Rashford, with a move to the Etihad Stadium not being ruled out.

arts.ttl: Man Utd respond to Alejandro Garnacho claims amid investigation into team news leaks
arts.sum: Team news has been getting leaked ahead of Manchester United games and the club have now responded to suggestions that winger Alejandro Garnacho is responsible for the leaks

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid Want to Sign 'Unstoppable' Man Utd Star
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid are reportedly showing interest in Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho ahead of the January transfer window.
